mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM osh_seckill_goods_tag WHERE seckill_goods_id = #{seckillGoodsId} AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_seckill_goods_tag (seckill_goods_id, tag_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{seckillGoodsId}, #{tagName}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updateBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)

INSERT INTO osh_seckill_goods_tag (seckill_goods_id, tag_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{tag.seckillGoodsId}, #{tag.tagName}, #{tag.sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tag.createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{tag.updateBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_seckill_goods_tag SET delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE seckill_goods_id = #{seckillGoodsId} AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
